task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into OpenClinic GA using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinic GA login screen with User '4' entered, or the post-login dashboard indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to system settings, financial, or administrative modules to locate bank registration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent browsing menus or pages related to system administration, financial institutions, or billing.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the target bank name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form field within the application containing the exact text 'Equity Bank'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the target bank code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form field within the application containing the exact text 'EQTY'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully saved or registered the new bank record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message indicating successful registration, or the newly created 'Equity Bank' record visible in a list/table of banks.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the OpenClinic GA web interface rather than just a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenClinic GA application interface should be visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or direct database queries to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows or database administration tools being used to insert the record directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't simply type the expected answers into a text editor or empty browser tab.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs 'Equity Bank' and 'EQTY' must be entered into actual form fields within the OpenClinic GA application.
